overallInterpretation: The demo artifact is terminal output from vitest showing 10 passing tests in engine/tilemap/types.test.ts. The tests cover tileset creation with sources and tiles, TileData physics polygon defaults, sparse cell storage in TileMapLayer, cell key packing/unpacking, coordinate helpers (cellToWorld, cellCentre, worldToCell with default and custom tileSize, cellToChunk), and chunk creation with null density grid. All 10 tests pass in 285ms, well within the 5000ms expected duration.

artifacts.interpretation: Terminal output from vitest v4.1.2 showing 1 test file with 10 passing tests and 0 failures. Tests confirm: TileSet creation, TileData polygon defaults, sparse cell storage, cell key pack/unpack round-tripping, cellToWorld lower-left corner positioning, cellCentre calculation, worldToCell floor-based mapping (default and custom tileSize), cellToChunk mapping, and chunk null-density grid initialization. Total duration 285ms.
